subject: english
text:
Read the given story and rewrite it in the form of a dialogue and practice role play: 
One day, a nut fell on Funny Bunny. “Ouch! The sky is going to fall!" said Funny Bunny. "I must tell the King. “On
the way, he met Henny Penny. "The sky is going to fall, “said Funny Bunny. "I'm going to tell the King." "I'll come
too," said Henny Penny. And off they went to find the King. Soon they met Cocky Locky.
